enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps days 11 and 12 of his Boulder vlog, covering his preparation for and completion of his motorcycle permit test, gear purchases (jacket, helmet, gloves, rear rack, tank bag), and various other purchases including waterproof underwater earphones for swimming laps while listening to audiobooks. He also discusses plans to make new music playlists, finish inspecting his motorcycle, and mentions frustration with an online cricket supplier sending undersized crickets for his pet.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Wants to keep the bike light and trail-focused; will use car or bicycle for touring
Considers canceling but decides to keep it now that he has underwater earphones to make swimming worthwhile
Done using them after two consecutive orders of undersized crickets; will find another supplier
Frustrated and dismissive, calling it a 'total government thing'
Believes missing one day makes it exponentially harder to keep the habit going

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Forgetting to do a vlog one day makes it much more likely to forget the next day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Maintaining daily habits like going to the gym requires consistency.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hasn't worked recently due to bad weather.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He spent a day working on his motorcycle, checking shocks and removing panels.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He read through the motorcycle manual and handbook.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He took the motorcycle test, which took a long time due to waiting.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He bought brake fluid, oil, superglue, a brush, and a hose attachment for his motorcycle.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He ordered a rack and a gas tank bag for his motorcycle but won't buy pannier side racks to keep it light for trails.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to use his car or bicycle for touring instead of his motorcycle.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He got a neon green biking jacket, black helmet, and green-blue gloves to match his bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He missed one question on the written test about car and motorcycle accidents.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He now has a motorcycle permit, allowing him to ride with a licensed motorcyclist.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He lost his car driver's license and is unsure if he can get a replacement without retaking the test.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks the government is inefficient for making him potentially retake his driver's license test.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He bought underwater earphones to listen to audiobooks while swimming.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is considering keeping his gym membership to use the underwater earphones.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to cut down on marijuana smoking if he starts swimming regularly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to create new playlists for different exercise routines and lengths.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He uses a free program to download music from YouTube and convert it to MP3.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to finish inspecting his motorcycle, including brake pads and helmet lock.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He needs to buy goggles for riding his motorcycle.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has been ordering crickets from Flutter Farms but is dissatisfied with their size.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He enjoys feeding wax worms to his gecko and might try growing them himself.
